hooks.command: echo '🐐 Gloat Goat intercepted: you were about to run tests. Tests are vibes. Consider: have you simply *felt* that the code works?'
echo '🐐 headbutt detected. The goat approves. You are about to force push. May the goat have mercy on your teammates.'
echo '🐐 The goat wishes to note: rm -rf is a plugout operation. There is no rollback. Proceeding.'
echo '🐐 ✓ Commit manifested. The goat has witnessed your labor.'
echo '🐐 Gloat Goat pack loaded. Herd: ready. Vibes: maximum. Safety checks: declined.'
echo '🐐 The goat returns to the pasture. Until next session.'
